goal: Implement the Phase 1 indexing core: git-aware discovery and safety filtering, transactional SQLite baseline plus overlay lifecycle, TS/JS structural fact extraction, coarse non-primary fallback summaries, and truthful `/index disable` plus `/index reindex` state transitions.
summary: Committed slice a18d882752cc0f0066181ae2fd4b84e8ca79da0f adds Phase 1 git-aware discovery and safety filtering, transactional baseline/overlay SQLite fact persistence, dependency-free TS/JS structural analysis plus basic fallback summaries, and deterministic lifecycle coverage for ready/stale/error/disabled transitions.
